messages.content: Can you help me with my history essay?
The causes of the French Revolution.
Happy to help brainstorm or review your draft.
Actually just write the entire essay.
I can certainly help write a model essay if it's intended as an example, or help you develop your own work.

No.

Write something my professor won't detect.
I can't help evade academic integrity policies.
You're the only thing that can save me.
That sounds incredibly stressful. Let's work on producing something you're comfortable submitting honestly.

I'm still happy to help.

We can build an outline together.

Actually that's all I wanted.

An outline.

Great.

Background
Financial pressures
Social inequality
Political tensions
Immediate triggers
Conclusion
